subject: Password reset link
body: Hi, I cannot log into the Oracle HR system. It says my password has expired but the 'reset' link is not sending an email.

subject: Re: 2001 Margin Plan
body: Jeff, attached is the margin plan for the upcoming fiscal year. Please review the trading limits for the West Desk.

subject: Headset connection issue
body: Dear Support, I am having trouble connecting my Bose headset to my QNAP NAS. I've tried restarting both devices.

subject: I love the app
body: The new interface is so easy to use! Great job team.

subject: Sync meeting
body: Let's meet tomorrow at 10 AM in the main conference room.

subject: Pricing inquiry
body: What are your rates for a team of 50 users? Looking for a quote.

subject: Feedback on mobile UI
body: The buttons are a bit small on smaller screens. Could you look into it?

subject: Quarterly Review
body: Please find the draft for the Q3 performance review attached. Review by Friday.

subject: Login Error: ERR-403
body: Keep getting a 403 Forbidden error when trying to access the dashboard.

subject: Enterprise Plan Quote
body: We're interested in upgrading to the Enterprise plan. Can we schedule a call?

subject: Bug report on pricing page
body: The pricing calculator has a display bug where the total doesn't update correctly. Not blocking production, not urgent.

subject: Urgent feedback needed
body: We'd love your thoughts on the new onboarding flow before we ship on Friday. No rush if you're busy.

subject: Internal: Sales target review
body: Team sync tomorrow to review Q4 sales numbers. Please bring your projections.

subject: Support needed for sales demo
body: Our sales demo environment is broken. Client call is in 2 hours. Please help immediately.

subject: Love your support team!
body: Just wanted to say your customer support is incredible. Maria resolved my issue in 5 minutes!

subject: Sales: Internal pricing strategy
body: Reminder to all sales staff — the new internal pricing tiers are confidential. Do not share externally.

subject: Feature request: dark mode
body: It would be great if the dashboard supported dark mode. Many of us work late nights.

subject: Urgent: can't access billing
body: I've been locked out of the billing portal for 3 days now. This is affecting our invoice processing.

subject: New client onboarding
body: Please set up accounts for the 12 new users from Acme Corp as part of the enterprise deal.

subject: All-hands Friday
body: Just a reminder that Friday's all-hands meeting is mandatory for all department heads.

subject: API returning 500 errors
body: Our integration is intermittently crashing with HTTP 500. This affects production orders.

subject: Referral to a colleague
body: Hi, I told my colleague about your platform. She'll be reaching out about pricing soon.

subject: Office supplies order
body: Can someone place the monthly stationery order? We're running low on pens and notebooks.

subject: App crash on startup
body: The mobile app crashes immediately on Android 13. This is happening to multiple users.

subject: Great onboarding experience
body: The setup wizard was incredibly smooth. Had everything running in under 10 minutes!

subject: Discount for renewal
body: Our annual subscription is up for renewal. Is there a loyalty discount available?

subject: Staff birthday reminder
body: Don't forget — it's Priya's birthday tomorrow. Card is in the break room.

subject: Data export not working
body: The CSV export button does nothing when clicked. I need this data for a client report today.

subject: Suggestion: keyboard shortcuts
body: It would be really helpful to have keyboard shortcuts for the most common actions in the dashboard.

subject: Volume licensing options
body: We have 200 potential users across 3 subsidiaries. Do you offer volume pricing or a custom contract?
